# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  CICDExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - codebuild.amazonaws.com
                - cloudwatch.events.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        -
          PolicyName: CICDExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              -
                Effect: Allow
                Action: '*'
                Resource: '*'

  CICDDynamoDBTableAccessPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: CICDDynamoDBTableAccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Action: dynamodb:GetItem
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/*'

  CICDAmazonS3AccessPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: CICDAmazonS3AccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Action: s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::/*'

  CrossAccountTrust:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: CrossAccountTrust
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::{AccountID1}'
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::{AccountID2}'
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::{AccountID3}'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
